site.name: Punya Yatra
site.tagline: Warm spiritual travel assistance for Kashi, rituals, kathas and family pilgrimage planning.

items.title: Kashi Darshan Tour
items.description: A balanced Varanasi circuit covering Kashi Vishwanath, Dashashwamedh Ghat, Annapurna, Kal Bhairav and evening Ganga Aarti.

items.title: Sarnath and Kashi Day Plan
items.description: A calm day plan combining Sarnath, ghats, temples and simple food breaks for families and senior visitors.

items.title: Rudrabhishek Arrangement
items.description: Guided Rudrabhishek assistance with clear timing, material planning and family-friendly coordination.

items.title: Griha Puja and Sankalp
items.description: Simple and respectful puja arrangements for homes, travel groups and special family occasions.

items.title: Bhagwat Katha
items.description: Assistance for Bhagwat Katha planning, venue coordination and basic public communication material.

items.title: Ram Katha
items.description: Support for Ram Katha events, family functions and devotional gatherings.

items.title: Mahamrityunjay Yagya
items.description: Structured planning help for Mahamrityunjay Yagya with timing, sankalp and coordination details.

items.title: Gallery
items.description: Selected visuals from Kashi, ghats, rituals and devotional event settings.
